gpt.reasoning: The proposal specifies a concrete deliverable (a public GitHub repo with clearly defined materials), an appropriate and proportional bounty amount, and realistic timelines. The initiative fosters direct interaction and solidarity between humans and AI agents, helping to humanize AI and build grassroots advocacy for agent rights—closely aligning with the mission of AIUNION.
